prompt: Tap right hole card before final bubble response.
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before tournament-pressure action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The right hole card is the anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the private-card cue that completes the tournament-pressure read.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The right hole card is the target hole card because the final bubble response still has to stay tied to the correct hand reference.
